code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut sign_a = 1
mut sign_b = 1
mut phase = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    let is_space = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
    let is_digit = c >= 48 and c <= 57
    let is_minus = c == 45
    if phase == 0
      if is_minus
        sign_a = -1
        phase = 1
      else if is_digit
        a = c - 48
        phase = 1
      end
    else if phase == 1
      if is_digit
        a = a * 10 + (c - 48)
      else if is_space
        phase = 2
      end
    else if phase == 2
      if is_minus
        sign_b = -1
        phase = 3
      else if is_digit
        b = c - 48
        phase = 3
      end
    else if phase == 3
      if is_digit
        b = b * 10 + (c - 48)
      else
        phase = 4
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let av = sign_a * a
let bv = sign_b * b
let r = av * av + bv * bv
println("r=#{r}")
